response:
Sun shines. Solar spectrum sparks synthesis.

Plants possess special pigments. Pigments soak photons. Subterranean parts sip soil solutions. Pores pull sky particles.

Photosynthesis proceeds. Solar power splits substances. Synthesis produces sweet sugar. Plants store starch. Pores pass pure puffs.

Sugar sustains stems. Power promotes sprouting. Plants prosper. Photosynthesis supports survival.
